title: Location · care_site (core)
notes:
Branch dimension: how the Location__care_site edge derives a `care_site` row per FHIR Location, keyed by Location.id (separate from, and APPENDED after, the Organization-derived care_sites keyed by Organization.id).

Grounded in mapspec/views/Location__care_site.view.json (stage-1 flatten) + mapspec/etl/Location__care_site.sql (stage-2). The stage-1 view extracts exactly three fields:
  id        = Location.id
  name      = Location.name
  type_code = Location.type.first().coding.where(system='http://snomed.info/sct').code.first()

Stage-2 SQL (positional → care_site column order care_site_id, care_site_name, place_of_service_concept_id, location_id, care_site_source_value, place_of_service_source_value):
  care_site_id                  = referenceToId(id)        -- hashtextextended(Location.id, 0)::bigint
  care_site_name                = left(name, 255)
  place_of_service_concept_id   = 0                         -- HARDCODED constant (no ConceptMap; Location.type SNOMED is not resolved to a Place-of-Service concept here)
  location_id                   = referenceToId(id)        -- SAME hash as care_site_id (Location is its own colocated location row)
  care_site_source_value        = id                        -- raw Location.id (traceability anchor, not truncated by left() — col is varchar(50) and Synthea ids fit)
  place_of_service_source_value = left(type_code, 50)       -- the raw SNOMED location-type code, or NULL

KEY MECHANICS, verified against the live DB:
  - referenceToId is null-aware hashtextextended(ref,0)::bigint. The runner resolves the case's "ref:loc-1" tokens through the SAME referenceToId('loc-1'), so care_site_id and location_id both bind to it. Verified on a real Synthea Location: referenceToId('06b0ed08-32f9-3944-838c-894e1025d70d') = 4956710933036450434, which equals BOTH care_site_id and location_id of the produced row (care_site_name 'OUTER CAPE HEALTH SERVICES INC', care_site_source_value = the same uuid).
  - place_of_service_concept_id is ALWAYS 0 ('No matching concept', verified vocab.concept WHERE concept_id=0). The Location.type SNOMED code is carried only into place_of_service_source_value (the source-value traceability column); it is NOT mapped to a standard Place-of-Service concept by this edge.
  - SYNTHEA REALITY: every Synthea Location carries a `name` and a `managingOrganization` but NO `type` element (verified: 0/262 locations have `type`). So in the real cohort place_of_service_source_value is uniformly NULL. managingOrganization is NOT read by the view at all — it drives nothing here (the Organization↔care_site link lives in the Organization__care_site edge, not this one).

ISOLATION: filename primary target is care_site, so the runner runs only edges whose target ∈ {care_site} ∪ listed-tables. Location also feeds Location__location (target=location), but that edge is skipped because `location` is never listed in any variant's omop — keeping every variant a pure care_site assertion.

VARIANTS:
  (a) Synthea-shaped: name + managingOrganization, no type → place_of_service_source_value NULL (mirrors the real cohort).
  (b) minimal: only Location.id → name NULL, type NULL → both care_site_name and place_of_service_source_value NULL; place_of_service_concept_id still 0.
  (c) with a SNOMED type coding → place_of_service_source_value = the SNOMED code (view-driven; synthetic shape Synthea doesn't emit, exercises the type_code path).
  (d) type with a non-SNOMED coding only → where(system=snomed) finds nothing → type_code NULL → place_of_service_source_value NULL (confirms the system filter).
  (e) name > 255 chars → care_site_name truncated to exactly 255 via left(name,255).

cases.desc: (a) Synthea-shaped Location: name + managingOrganization, no type → one care_site row; place_of_service_source_value NULL (managingOrganization drives nothing in this edge)
(b) minimal Location: only id → care_site_name NULL, place_of_service_source_value NULL, place_of_service_concept_id 0; care_site_id = location_id = referenceToId(id)
(c) Location with a SNOMED type coding → place_of_service_source_value = the SNOMED code (raw, not concept-mapped); place_of_service_concept_id still hardcoded 0
(d) Location.type with only a NON-SNOMED coding → where(system=snomed) empty → type_code NULL → place_of_service_source_value NULL
(e) name longer than 255 chars → care_site_name truncated to exactly 255 via left(name,255)
